name: Chicken Provencale
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (15 ½ oz each) great northern beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the chicken in oil; remove and set aside.
2. Sauté onion and garlic in drippings until tender.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients.
4. Spoon into a 3 quart baking dish; arrange chicken pieces on top.
5. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 65-75 minutes or until chicken juices run clear.
